name: Apply Worker

meta.schedule: Every few minutes during working hours
meta.notes: Paces apply via HTTP; queue lives in Postgres ApplyJob

nodesHint: Cron Trigger (e.g. every 3–5 min in working hours)
On timeout retry: pass applyJobId from previous successful claim response
Empty queue returns status EMPTY (do not treat as error)
Retries on 5xx / network; Error Workflow on failure
